basics.name: Lacy Morrow
basics.label: Agentic & web engineer + open-source developer + hardware hacker
basics.summary:
Over 20 years as a Web Developer building accessible, well-architected sites and apps. Creator of pixel-perfect, mobile-first development with graceful degradation and progressive enhancement.

EXPERTISE: Agentic engineer + Full-stack developer + Hardware Engineer; Agency owner; Tech/Development lead; Product/Project manager; DevOps; IT consultant; Software architect; Hiring manager; SCRUM master

I especially enjoy TypeScript, React, NextJS, and Electron/Tauri

QUALITIES: Tech leader. Passionate about quality. Communicative and accessible; Reliable, confident, and eager to build. A highly motivated problem-solver.

work.name: Duke Energy
work.summary: Created internal GPT setup for company use. Contract - Refactored a weather-forecasting dashboard to deploy to AWS and migrated authentication to Azure A/D (Active Directory) from user/password. Python, React, Docker, AWS, Azure, Regex, Cron

work.name: Credit Karma
work.summary: Contract - Created the entire User Testing dashboard for Credit Karma for the User Management team. Converted pages router to App router. Built features for creating test/production users across the web and mobile experience. Included search and metrics coordinated across multiple system APIs. TypeScript, NextJS, React, Tachyons, React Native

work.name: Novant Health / Red Ventures
work.summary: Contract - Build and maintained Physician Finder, Matcher, and landing pages sites for Novant to locate doctors. Legacy code was sunsetted and new, modern websites were built using TypeScript, NextJS, and Vue, tooled with Datadog/Netlify.

work.name: OptumRX Health / Red Ventures
work.summary: Contract - Created E-commerce site for RVO Health. Built the market, inventory, authentication, and ordering systems, complete with automation pipelines. TypeScript, NextJS, React, Contentful, Plytix, Stripe, Algolia

work.name: Swell Energy
work.summary: Contract - Developed charts, dashboards, control panels to manage solar and power utilities in southern California and Hawaii. Authentication, API, UI, CRUD. TypeScript, NextJS, React, Python, Django, Docker, PostgreSQL

work.name: Lumenai (Startup)
work.summary: Contract Full-Stack Web Developer - Helped create foundational internal apps and build process for a browser extension using RPA automation, React, SASS, Docker. Created dynamic robust UI screens React, Typescript, Jest, automated deployments, and self-built CI/CD.

work.name: TekSystems
work.summary: Government contract with the VA. Built health medicine tools + calculators to lessen the amount of information patients had to fill out and help physicians get accurate stats about health issues.

work.name: Viasat
work.summary: Contract - Managed in-flight entertainment portals for dozens of airlines. On-call. In charge of workflow management and client-stakeholder relations. Demoed product updates to stakeholders. React, TypeScript, NextJS, Jenkins, AWS, MySQL

work.name: Twilio Inc.
work.summary: In charge of twilio.com and all sub-sites. Managed and lead multiple projects, created a React design system, built the SIGNAL HackPack v4 badge. Launched WhatsApp, Studio, Flex, products. Localization/Regionalization. Implemented testing, migrated blog and legal to a CMS. TypeScript, React, Docker, Python, Django, Wagtail, PHP, WordPress, i18n.

work.name: Flymore (Startup)
work.summary: Hosted a camp for kids to build FPV drones with a focus on teaching kids about basic software & electronics. Hosted first drone race in Charlotte, NC. Developed software to livestream 4 analog FPV feeds. OpenStack, Apache, Linux, ReactJS, GraphQL, WordPress, PHP

work.name: Long Game
work.summary: Contract - Helped create a startup's initial mobile app: React web-app and second-iteration React Native app for IOS and Android; Saw first launch to 100+ beta users. AWS, NodeJS, Docker, SequelizeJS, React Native

work.name: Yahoo
work.summary: Contract - Built several React components on a Yahoo stack for the Search and Branded Marketing teams using Tumblr as a data serve API. OpenStack, Apache, Linux, NodeJS, ReactJS, Electron, NW.js, Selenium.

work.name: 10up
work.summary: Took on every role and responsibility of designing, creating, implementing, deploying, and maintaining a plethora of websites for numerous clients including: Microsoft, Uber, AARP, and Beasley Media. Docker, Electron, PHP, WordPress, SASS, Webpack, AWS, Google Analytics

work.name: Invitae
work.summary: Senior Full-Stack Web Developer - Created and maintained HIPAA-compliant back office software, data science tools, and analytics software as well as the public-facing invitae.com. Python, PHP, MySQL, Django, Flask, Angular, Backbone, React, WordPress, ElasticSearch, NightwatchJS, Docker, Jenkins, AWS

work.name: Appalachian State University
work.summary: Built internal websites and scheduling software. Created custom CMS framework with PHP, Postgres used by all campus web pages. PHP, Python, Postgres, MySQL, PHPWebsite, PHPUnit, Git, Apache, Linux

work.name: Red Ventures
work.summary: Front-End Web Developer - Created 10+ branded advertising websites and unique user interactions. PHP, MySQL, Linux

projects.name: Lacy Shell
projects.summary: AI Coding Agent for Your Terminal. Integrate Codex, Claude Code, or your favorite AI coding CLI into your existing shell.

projects.name: Juno AI
projects.summary: Voice-Operate Your Computer. Rust + Tauri Desktop app built on OpenAI Whisper and Anthropic Computer-use.

projects.name: Shipkit
projects.summary: Next.js Accelerator. Full-featured Next.js Starter and toolkit for building, launching, and monetizing MVPs.

projects.name: CrossOver
projects.summary: CrossHair Overlay. Electron cross-platform custom crosshairs for PC video games. Featured in the Windows app store and Snapcraft store.

projects.name: Twilio Hackpack v4
projects.summary: Twilio's Open Source Hardware Badge, built for SIGNAL Conference 2018. Joystick, lights, 7 buttons, a touchscreen, on a Raspberry Pi Zero.

references.reference: Lacy is an extremely talented engineer with a very broad range of skills and experience. From being a thought leader in the front-end community via backbonetutorials.com and cdnjs.com, to designing and implementing the API for cdnjs.com, working with Lacy has been fantastic learning experience. Lacy is truly a full stack developer, and his work output is incredible. If there is any opportunity to work with Lacy, I take it. He is the definition of an A player.
references.name: Ryan Kirkram, Senior Software Engineer at Yahoo
